title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2026
summary:
Main
Iron ore futures saw intense trading today, with the most-traded contract I2609 closing at 800 yuan/mt, up0.19% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices were basically flat compared to the previous day. Traders showed moderate quoting activity; steel mills restocked on an as-needed basis with few inquiries; overall spot market transactions were limited.
